ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) ROKRAT cloud C2 — non-browser egress to pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox APIs
ucs.description: Hunts ROKRAT/M2RAT family C2 traffic, which is the most distinctive APT37 behaviour: payloads abuse legitimate cloud-storage APIs (api.pcloud.com, cloud-api.yandex.net, content.dropboxapi.com) for staging, tasking, and exfil instead of dedicated infrastructure. Anomalous non-browser/non-sync-client processes connecting to these endpoints — especially shortly after a document or LNK launch — is a high-fidelity ScarCruft tell.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest="*api.pcloud.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*cloud-api.yandex.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="*content.dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*api.dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*webdav.yandex.ru" OR All_Traffic.dest="*pcloud.com") by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process_name All_Traffic.user _time span=1h | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | search NOT process_name IN ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","iexplore.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","safari.exe","Dropbox.exe","YandexDisk*.exe","pcloud*.exe","OneDrive.exe","Teams.exe","slack.exe") | join type=outer src process_name [| tstats summariesonly=true count as proc_seen values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_process values(Processes.process) as process_cmdline from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("powershell.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","hwp.exe","Hwp.exe","hancom*.exe","explorer.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*hwp*","*.lnk*","*chm*") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name | rename Processes.dest as src Processes.process_name as process_name] | where isnotnull(proc_seen) OR count > 5 | eval actor="APT37 / ScarCruft / InkySquid (G0067)" | table firstTime lastTime src user process_name parent_process process_cmdline dest dest_port count actor | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let RokRatCloud = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","pcloud.com","yandex.com"]);
let LegitClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","iexplore.exe","brave.exe","dropbox.exe","yandexdisk.exe","pcloud.exe","onedrive.exe","teams.exe","slack.exe"]);
let SuspectLures = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe"))
        or InitiatingProcessFileName has_any ("hwp.exe","hwp64.exe","hwordapp.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe")
        or ProcessCommandLine has_any (".hwp",".chm",".lnk","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String")
    | project LureTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, AccountName,
              LureProcess = FileName, LureCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              LureParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where RemoteUrl has_any (RokRatCloud)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (LegitClients)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
          ProcName = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ProcCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ProcParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          ProcUser = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          ProcSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
          RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| join kind=leftouter SuspectLures on DeviceId
| where datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, LureTime) between (0 .. 60)
      or ProcName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
      or ProcParent has_any ("hwp", "hwordapp", "hcell", "hshow")
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            ConnCount = count(),
            Urls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 25),
            DestIPs = make_set(RemoteIP, 25),
            LureProcesses = make_set(LureProcess, 10),
            LureCmds = make_set(LureCmd, 10)
            by DeviceName, ProcName, ProcCmd, ProcUser, ProcSHA256
| extend Actor = "APT37 / ScarCruft / InkySquid / Reaper (G0067)"
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let RokRatCloud = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","pcloud.com"]);
let LegitClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","iexplore.exe","brave.exe","dropbox.exe","yandexdisk.exe","pcloud.exe","onedrive.exe","teams.exe","slack.exe"]);
let SuspectLures = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | where (TargetProcessName has_any ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe"))
        or ParentProcessName has_any ("hwp.exe","hwordapp.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe")
        or TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (".hwp",".chm",".lnk","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String")
    | project LureTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              LureProcess = TargetProcessName, LureCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
              LureParent = ParentProcessName;
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where isnotempty(Url) or isnotempty(DstHostname)
| extend Dest = coalesce(DstHostname, Url)
| where Dest has_any (RokRatCloud)
| extend Proc = tolower(tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists("ActingProcessName", ""), "")))
| where Proc !in~ (LegitClients)
| where SrcUsername !endswith "$"
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, SrcIpAddr, SrcUsername,
          Proc,
          ProcCmd = column_ifexists("ActingProcessCommandLine",""),
          DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, Url, Dest
| join kind=leftouter SuspectLures on DvcHostname
| where datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, LureTime) between (0 .. 60)
      or Proc in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
      or LureParent has_any ("hwp","hwordapp","hcell","hshow")
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            ConnCount = count(),
            Destinations = make_set(Dest, 25),
            DestIPs = make_set(DstIpAddr, 25),
            LureProcesses = make_set(LureProcess, 10)
            by DvcHostname, Proc, ProcCmd, SrcUsername
| extend Actor = "APT37 / ScarCruft / InkySquid / Reaper (G0067)"
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: ROKRAT (and its variants M2RAT/Dolphin/Chinotto) is APT37's signature implant family and is uniquely identified by its abuse of legitimate cloud-storage APIs — pCloud, Yandex Disk, Dropbox — for full bidirectional C2 (T1102.002) rather than dedicated attacker infra. Volexity, Kaspersky, ESTsecurity, and Cisco Talos have all documented this pattern across 2017→2024 ScarCruft campaigns. Filtering to

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 HWP/CHM/LNK lure → script-host download cradle (ScarCruft initial-access chain)
ucs.description: Targets APT37's hallmark delivery chain against Korean-speaking targets: a malicious Hangul (.hwp), CHM, or weaponised LNK in a ZIP causes Hancom Office or Explorer to spawn PowerShell, mshta, or rundll32 which then pulls the next stage (often via certutil/curl/IEX). This parent→child→download cradle is the recurring opener for ROKRAT, GOLDBACKDOOR, M2RAT, and Chinotto staging.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_hash) as hash values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmdline from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("hwp.exe","Hwp.exe","hwp64.exe","hwordapp.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","hh.exe","explorer.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe")) OR (Processes.parent_process_name="hh.exe" AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe") AND (Processes.process IN ("*FromBase64String*","*-EncodedCommand*","*DownloadString*","*WebClient*","*Invoke-Expression*","*IEX*","*certutil*-decode*","*certutil*-urlcache*","*.hwp*","*.chm*","*api.pcloud*","*yandex*","*dropboxapi*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT user IN ("SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") | eval actor="APT37 / ScarCruft (G0067)", chain=parent_process_name." -> ".process_name | table firstTime lastTime dest user chain parent_cmdline cmdline hash actor count | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let HancomParents  = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hwp64.exe","hwordapp.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe"]);
let ScriptChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe"]);
let StagingTokens = dynamic(["FromBase64String","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","DownloadString","DownloadFile","Invoke-Expression","IEX(","WebClient","-urlcache","-decode","api.pcloud","yandex","dropboxapi",".hwp",".chm",".lnk"]);
let HancomChain = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName has_any (HancomParents)
    | where FileName in~ (ScriptChildren);
let ChmChain = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "hh.exe"
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe");
let LnkExplorerChain = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
    | where FileName in~ (ScriptChildren)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (StagingTokens)
        or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has ".lnk";
union HancomChain, ChmChain, LnkExplorerChain
| extend HasStagingToken = ProcessCommandLine has_any (StagingTokens)
| where HasStagingToken or InitiatingProcessFileName has_any (HancomParents) or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "hh.exe"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentFolder = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          Child = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          GrandParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName
| extend Actor = "APT37 / ScarCruft / InkySquid / Reaper (G0067)",
         Chain = strcat(Parent, " -> ", Child)
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let HancomParents  = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hwp64.exe","hwordapp.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe"]);
let ScriptChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe"]);
let StagingTokens  = dynamic(["FromBase64String","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","DownloadString","DownloadFile","Invoke-Expression","IEX(","WebClient","-urlcache","-decode","api.pcloud","yandex","dropboxapi",".hwp",".chm",".lnk"]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where
      (ParentProcessName has_any (HancomParents) and TargetProcessName has_any (ScriptChildren))
   or (ParentProcessName has "hh.exe" and TargetProcessName has_any ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe"))
   or (ParentProcessName has "explorer.exe" and TargetProcessName has_any (ScriptChildren) and (TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (StagingTokens) or ParentProcessCommandLine has ".lnk"))
| extend HasStagingToken = TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (StagingTokens)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          Parent = ParentProcessName,
          ParentCmd = ParentProcessCommandLine,
          Child = TargetProcessName,
          ChildCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          HasStagingToken
| extend Actor = "APT37 / ScarCruft / InkySquid / Reaper (G0067)",
         Chain = strcat(Parent, " -> ", Child)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft HWP/CHM/LNK Lure Spawning Script Host
id: 9b3a8f72-4d1e-4f8a-bc6f-8a7d2a1c5e90
status: experimental
description: Detects APT37 (ScarCruft / Reaper / InkySquid) initial access — Hancom Office (.hwp), CHM, or LNK lures spawning PowerShell/mshta/rundll32/wscript with download-cradle indicators.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://www.volexity.com/blog/2021/08/17/north-korean-apt-inkysquid-infects-victims-using-browser-exploits/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/group-123-goes-wild/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.initial-access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1203
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  hancom_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\hwp.exe'
      - '\hwp64.exe'
      - '\hwordapp.exe'
      - '\hcell.exe'
      - '\hshow.exe'
      - '\hh.exe'
  script_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
  staging_tokens:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - ' -enc '
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'DownloadFile'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'IEX('
      - 'WebClient'
      - '-urlcache'
      - '-decode'
      - 'api.pcloud'
      - 'yandex'
      - 'dropboxapi'
      - '.hwp'
      - '.chm'
  filter_user:
    User|contains:
      - 'SYSTEM'
      - 'LOCAL SERVICE'
      - 'NETWORK SERVICE'
  condition: (hancom_parent and script_child) or (script_child and staging_tokens) and not filter_user
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate Hancom Office macros that spawn cmd.exe for printing in Korean enterprises (rare; baseline first)
  - Korean-localised admin scripts wrapped as .chm helpers
level: high
ucs.rationale: APT37/ScarCruft has overwhelmingly used Hangul Word Processor (.hwp) documents — a format almost exclusive to Korean-speaking targets — paired with Equation Editor / Flash / IE 0-day exploit chains (e.g. CVE-2017-0199, CVE-2018-0802, CVE-2020-1380, CVE-2022-41128) plus weaponised CHM and LNK files. Talos (Group 123 report), Kaspersky (ScarCruft), Volexity (InkySquid), and ESTsecurity have all repe
